title: Cheesy Portable Furnace
body:
Portable Furnace
[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/g7wG4MwfJn) | [Changelogs](https://discord.com/invite/g7wG4MwfJn) | [Test Server](https://discord.com/invite/g7wG4MwfJn)

![Action bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ffb08917a3705d11a8833b89d307af2fa8ed071.png)

Portable Furnace is a powerful plugin
that lets you smelt items anywhere!

**Key Features:**
- Dual Access Methods: Use Blaze Rod or /pf open command
- Real-time Progress: Visual cooking progress with action bar updates
- Smart Inventory: Intelligent item handling and stack management
- Fuel System: Traditional furnace fuel system with fuel-less option
- Visual Feedback: Color-coded progress and fuel indicators
- Effect System: Customizable sounds and particles
- Permission Control: Fine-grained access management
- Data Persistence: Optional inventory saving between sessions

**How to install**
- Put the plugin jar into your plugin
- Restart server & edit config
- [V1.0]

![Blaze Rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd25d46705d547d48c5e536b86dadc644bf60273.png)

**Commands**
- /portablefurnace open - Open portable furnace
- /portablefurnace reload - Reload configuration
- /portablefurnace help - Show help menu
- (or /pfurnace)

**Permissions**
- portablefurnace.use - Access furnace
- portablefurnace.reload - Reload config

**Coming Soon**
- Multiple furnace support
- Custom recipes
- Statistics tracking
- Auto-smelt features


Support Need help?
Found a bug?
Have a suggestion?
